## What does this change?

<!-- A short description of the change and the motivation. Link any related issue: "Fixes #123". -->

## How was it tested?

<!-- e.g. new/updated unit tests, `mvn clean install` green locally, manual verification against a running venue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `mvn clean install` passes locally (full reactor, with tests)
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests; bug fixes include a regression test
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or APIs changed (British English, please)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under *Unreleased* if the change is user-visible
